---
name: Bug report
about: Something didn't work as expected
labels: bug
---

**What vocabulary type were you using?**
e.g. TouchChat™ WordPower 60 Basic SS, WordPower 42, etc.

**What happened?**
Describe what went wrong — an error message, a missing result, something that looks wrong in the report.

**What did you expect to happen?**

**Any error message shown on screen?**
Paste the exact text if you can.

**Build / version (helps reproduce the bug)**
Copy the line at the bottom of the upload page (it looks like `Build … · …`).

**Device and browser (optional)**
e.g. iPhone / Safari, Windows / Chrome
